http://web.rubika.ir.title: Missing Security Header: Content-Security-Policy
http://web.rubika.ir.description: Content-Security-Policy (CSP) header is missing. This allows attackers to inject and execute malicious scripts (XSS).
http://web.rubika.ir.remediation: Add a strict CSP header. Start with a restrictive policy and relax as needed.
http://web.rubika.ir.vuln_code: # Missing CSP header — no protection against XSS

http://web.rubika.ir.title: Missing Security Header: X-Content-Type-Options
http://web.rubika.ir.description: X-Content-Type-Options header is missing. Browsers may MIME-sniff responses, potentially executing non-script resources as scripts.

http://web.rubika.ir.title: Missing Security Header: Strict-Transport-Security
http://web.rubika.ir.description: HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) header is missing. Users can be downgraded to HTTP connections.
http://web.rubika.ir.remediation: Add HSTS with a long max-age. Consider including subdomains and preload.

http://web.rubika.ir.title: Missing Security Header: Referrer-Policy
http://web.rubika.ir.description: Referrer-Policy header is missing. The browser may leak the full URL in the Referer header to third parties.

http://web.rubika.ir.title: Missing Security Header: X-Frame-Options
http://web.rubika.ir.description: X-Frame-Options header is missing. The page can be embedded in an iframe, enabling clickjacking attacks.
http://web.rubika.ir.remediation: Add: X-Frame-Options: DENY (or SAMEORIGIN if iframe embedding is needed on same domain)

http://web.rubika.ir.title: Missing Security Header: Permissions-Policy
http://web.rubika.ir.description: Permissions-Policy header is missing. Browser features (camera, microphone, geolocation) are not explicitly restricted.
http://web.rubika.ir.remediation: Add a Permissions-Policy header restricting unused browser features.

http://web.rubika.ir.title: Missing Security Header: X-XSS-Protection
http://web.rubika.ir.description: X-XSS-Protection header is missing. Modern browsers have deprecated this, but older browsers benefit from it.
http://web.rubika.ir.remediation: Add: X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block (or 0 to disable broken IE implementation)

http://web.rubika.ir.title: Information Disclosure: Server: Microsoft-IIS/10.0
http://web.rubika.ir.description: Server header reveals the web server version, aiding attackers in targeting known vulnerabilities.
http://web.rubika.ir.remediation: Remove or obfuscate the Server header in your web server configuration.

http://web.rubika.ir.title: Information Disclosure: X-Powered-By: ASP.NET
http://web.rubika.ir.description: X-Powered-By header reveals the backend technology stack (e.g., PHP/5.6), aiding attackers.
http://web.rubika.ir.remediation: Remove the X-Powered-By header (e.g., header_remove('X-Powered-By') in PHP).

web.rubika.ir.title: SSL/TLS Certificate Expiring Soon (27 days)
web.rubika.ir.remediation: Renew the certificate before it expires. Configure auto-renewal to prevent outages.

web.rubika.ir.title: SSL Certificate Hostname Mismatch
web.rubika.ir.description: Certificate does not match hostname "web.rubika.ir": x509: certificate is not valid for any names, but wanted to match web.rubika.ir
web.rubika.ir.remediation: Issue a certificate that covers the correct hostname or add a Subject Alternative Name (SAN) entry.

HIGH.title: SSL Certificate Hostname Mismatch
HIGH.description: Certificate does not match hostname "web.rubika.ir": x509: certificate is not valid for any names, but wanted to match web.rubika.ir
HIGH.remediation: Issue a certificate that covers the correct hostname or add a Subject Alternative Name (SAN) entry.
